case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. EMILIO SILVESTRI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVESTRI, EMILIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEILA ROBLETO-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED.
